name: Advanced Network Recon
long_description: Scapy is a powerful interactive packet manipulation program. It is able to forge or decode packets of a wide number of protocols, send them on the wire, capture them, match requests and replies, and much more.
command_template: from scapy.all import *; import sys; conf.verb = 0; type = '{type}'; target = '{target}'; if type == 'arp_ping': ans, unans = srp(Ether(dst='ff:ff:ff:ff:ff:ff')/ARP(pdst=target), timeout=2); [print(f'UP: {rcv.psrc} - {rcv.hwsrc}') for snd, rcv in ans]; elif type == 'icmp_ping': ans, unans = sr(IP(dst=target)/ICMP(), timeout=2); [print(f'UP: {rcv.src}') for snd, rcv in unans if ICMP in rcv and rcv[ICMP].type == 0]

fields.label: Target IP/Range
fields.help: Target IP address or CIDR range.

safety.consent_message: Scapy requires elevated privileges for raw sockets. Ensure you have authorization to scan this network.
